capabilities.label: BIM and openBIM
capabilities.boundary: open formats direct; OpenUSD/USDZ and 3D Tiles as source-bound engineering scene routes; proprietary formats through lawful adapters

capabilities.label: CAD and engineering geometry
capabilities.boundary: direct where license-compatible; glTF/GLB are engineering scene or visual asset routes, not proof of BIM semantics; DWG and vendor formats through lawful adapters

capabilities.label: PDF and fixed-layout documents
capabilities.boundary: bounded source parser, renderer, annotation, and signature routes; OFD follows GB/T 33190-2016 source package rules

capabilities.label: Office documents
capabilities.boundary: Collabora WOPI is preferred for ODF native sessions; open parsers and document converters are adapter routes; macros disabled unless isolated

capabilities.label: Audio
capabilities.boundary: metadata, transcription, diarization, and evidence routes

capabilities.label: Video
capabilities.boundary: metadata, frame extraction, captions, segmentation, and evidence routes

capabilities.label: Images
capabilities.boundary: metadata, OCR, segmentation, annotation, and derivative routes

capabilities.label: Archives and decompression
capabilities.boundary: bounded listing and safe extraction with checksums

capabilities.label: Code programming assets
capabilities.boundary: AST and markup parsing, dependency inspection, generation, validation, source-native HTML/XML/text viewing and editing contracts, tests, and sandboxed execution only
